# Product card component

## Context

You are working in a React project that uses Tailwind CSS. The product card should display consistently on phones and desktops and look correct in both light and dark appearances.

## Task

Build a product card component. The card should include:

- An image area (placeholder is fine)
- A title
- A short description
- Two actions (e.g. "Add to cart" and "Learn more")

Implement the component so it works on small and large screens and supports a dark appearance. Use Tailwind for all styling.

## Expected Outputs

- At least one component file (e.g. `ProductCard.tsx` or `ProductCard.jsx`) that renders the card.
- No new dependencies are required beyond React and Tailwind already in the project.
